description_long: This is a round, single-tier birthday cake with a smooth, white frosted exterior and light blue piped icing borders along the top and bottom edges. The cake is decorated with several thin, multicolored candles standing upright on the top surface, and the words 'Happy Birthday' are written in blue icing across the top. The sides of the cake show a slightly textured, ridged pattern, likely from the application of the frosting. The cake appears to be made of a soft, spongy interior, typical of layered cakes, with a thick layer of icing covering the outside. No additional decorations or embellishments are present beyond the candles and piped borders. The cake is not displayed on any visible plate or stand, resting directly on a flat surface.
description: A round, single-tier birthday cake with white frosting, blue piped borders, and multicolored candles on top. 'Happy Birthday' is written in blue icing across the top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Happy Birthday' message, blue piped borders, and a full arrangement of candles.
description_view_1: Side view with the 'Birthday' part of the message visible, blue piped border, and candles seen from an angle.
description_view_2: Rear side view with the message partially visible and the ridged frosting texture prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with candles and blue border visible, but the message is mostly obscured.
